data.description: Each turn, the target makes a Wisdom saving throw against the spell. If it succeeds, the spell ends. At Higher Levels: When cast using a 5th-level or higher spell slot, the duration increases to up to 10 minutes with concentration, and up to 1 hour or more when using a spell slot of 6th level or higher.

A creature the target can see within 30 feet must succeed on a DC 21 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you for the duration. While charmed in this way, the target respects your commands, which it follows even if they are impossible or clearly harmful to itself (though the target might feign compliance). A dominated creature can make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw at the start of each of its turns. On a success, the effect ends. While under this effect, the creature doesn't regain hit points.

Vou can use your action to establish a telepathic link with a creature you can see within 60 feet. As long as the link persists, Vou can use your bonus action each turn to convey one simple or general command to the creature (no actions required), such as 'Attack creature,' 'Run there,' or 'Fetch that object.' The creature must be willing and able to follow these commands. If the creature completes an order from you, it defends itself to the best of its ability, but does not take any other actions unless Vou allow it to do so. Additionally, if a creature takes damage from a spell while under this link, it must make a Wisdom saving throw against that spell's save DC. On a success, the spell ends.
A spell that creates a mansion of magical dimensions. The mansion can be as small or as large as the caster desires, and it appears within range.
